channel.title: MLLMs on Camille's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in MLLMs on Camille's Blog

item.title: Doc AI Databases
item.description: Document AI gathers several tasks, such as Document Classification, Document Information Extraction, Document reconstruction, Document Captioning, Document summarization, and Document Question Answering. What is notable is that (1) Multipage VrDU datasets have recently emerged and are steadily increasing .colored { background-color: rgba(255, 235, 59, 0.6); padding: 0 1px; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255, 235, 59, 0.6); display: inline; line-height: 1.5; } , indicating a shift in the field towards this type of task.

item.title: Vision-Language Models for Document Understanding
item.description: We review in this post the literature on Vision-Language Models for fine-grained images (documents). .bigger { font-size: 1.5em; padding: 0 1px; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block; line-height: 1.5; } .bigger::before { content: "\A"; white-space: pre; } What are VLMs? .bigger { font-size: 1.5em; padding: 0 1px; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block; line-height: 1.5; } .bigger::before { content: "\A"; white-space: pre; } Vision-Language Models .
